description: Legal document likely in the hand of the clerk of Yehoshua Maimonides. Concerning a man and his wife who was the daughter of the late Makīn, and a payment in installments. Signed by Yosef b. Ṣedaqa. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
